steps: Autoclave BD Difco AC Broth and NaCl Qs to 1 L with distilled water for 20 min. 00:20:00 See formulation in guidelines.

After broth has cooled, add 16 ml 2 M MgSO 4 and 10 ml 1 M CaCl 2 (2 M MgSO 4 ·7H 2 O = 49.3 g/100 ml H 2 O, dissolve and 0.2 µm filter) (1 M CaCl 2 ·2H 2 O = 14.7 g/100 ml H 2 O, dissolve and 0.2 µm filter)
Dispense 2.0 or 4.5 ml per sterile tube
Inoculate sterile MPB with 1:5 (vol:vol) dilution of culture
Incubate at 22°C Heterotrophs normally grow in less than 2 days. No growth in the broth after 1-2 weeks indicates culture is axenic.
creator: Bonnie Poulos
